properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You, Oh Lord, are a strong and mighty tower an ever present help in my darkest hour You're my hiding place, You're the ancient of days. You're the rock on which I'm standing, You are worthy of my praise.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be, Blessed be Blessed be Your Name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You, Oh Lord are the deep that I have searched for. The ever flowing fountain that my heart always thirst for. You're The One that makes me whole, You're The Lover of my soul, And whatever comes my way, I know You're in control

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And let you people proclaim You are holy, Holy are You Lord, And so we lift up Your Name And give glory Glory to Your Name
